'''鈭歾h-k-z''' ('''kazhakaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhizosecrete|rhizosecrete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhizosecrete|rhizosecrete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kazhakaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhakaz|thizhakaz]] || [[word:jizhakaz|jizhakaz]] || [[word:shizhakaz|shizhakaz]] || [[word:kizhakaz|kizhakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhakaz|thuthuzhakaz]] || [[word:jujuzhakaz|jujuzhakaz]] || [[word:shushuzhakaz|shushuzhakaz]] || [[word:kukuzhakaz|kukuzhakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhakaz|thuzhakaz]] || [[word:juzhakaz|juzhakaz]] || [[word:shuzhakaz|shuzhakaz]] || [[word:kuzhakaz|kuzhakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhakaz|thuzhakaz]] || [[word:juzhakaz|juzhakaz]] || [[word:shuzhakaz|shuzhakaz]] || [[word:kuzhakaz|kuzhakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhakaz|thezhakaz]] || [[word:jezhakaz|jezhakaz]] || [[word:shezhakaz|shezhakaz]] || [[word:kezhakaz|kezhakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhakaz|thothozhakaz]] || [[word:jojozhakaz|jojozhakaz]] || [[word:shoshozhakaz|shoshozhakaz]] || [[word:kokozhakaz|kokozhakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhakaz|thozhakaz]] || [[word:jozhakaz|jozhakaz]] || [[word:shozhakaz|shozhakaz]] || [[word:kozhakaz|kozhakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhakaz|thozhakaz]] || [[word:jozhakaz|jozhakaz]] || [[word:shozhakaz|shozhakaz]] || [[word:kozhakaz|kozhakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhakaz|th忙zhakaz]] || [[word:j忙zhakaz|j忙zhakaz]] || [[word:sh忙zhakaz|sh忙zhakaz]] || [[word:k忙zhakaz|k忙zhakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhakaz|thathazhakaz]] || [[word:jajazhakaz|jajazhakaz]] || [[word:shashazhakaz|shashazhakaz]] || [[word:kakazhakaz|kakazhakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhakaz|thazhakaz]] || [[word:jazhakaz|jazhakaz]] || [[word:shazhakaz|shazhakaz]] || [[word:kazhakaz|kazhakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhakaz|thazhakaz]] || [[word:jazhakaz|jazhakaz]] || [[word:shazhakaz|shazhakaz]] || [[word:kazhakaz|kazhakaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhakaz|shazhakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhakaz|goshazhakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhakaz|gokishazhakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhakazn眉|shazhakazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkn眉|goshazhakaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhakazn眉|gokishazhakazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhakazsh毛|shazhakazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhakaznksh毛|goshazhakaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhakazsh毛|gokishazhakazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhakazro|shazhakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkro|goshazhakaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhakazro|gokishazhakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhakazmu|shazhakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkmu|goshazhakaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhakazmu|gokishazhakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhakazsher|shazhakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhakaznksher|goshazhakaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhakazsher|gokishazhakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhakazng|shazhakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkng|goshazhakaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhakazng|gokishazhakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhakazya|shazhakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkya|goshazhakaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhakazya|gokishazhakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhakazyam|shazhakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkyam|goshazhakaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhakazyam|gokishazhakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhakazn眉sh毛|shazhakazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkn眉sh毛|goshazhakaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhakazn眉sh毛|gokishazhakazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhakazn眉ro|shazhakazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkn眉ro|goshazhakaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhakazn眉ro|gokishazhakazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhakazn眉mu|shazhakazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkn眉mu|goshazhakaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhakazn眉mu|gokishazhakazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhakazsh毛n眉|shazhakazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhakaznksh毛n眉|goshazhakaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhakazsh毛n眉|gokishazhakazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhakazsh毛ro|shazhakazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhakaznksh毛ro|goshazhakaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhakazsh毛ro|gokishazhakazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhakazsh毛mu|shazhakazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhakaznksh毛mu|goshazhakaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhakazsh毛mu|gokishazhakazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhakazron眉|shazhakazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkron眉|goshazhakaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhakazron眉|gokishazhakazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhakazrosh毛|shazhakazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkrosh毛|goshazhakaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhakazrosh毛|gokishazhakazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhakazromu|shazhakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkromu|goshazhakaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhakazromu|gokishazhakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhakazmun眉|shazhakazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkmun眉|goshazhakaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhakazmun眉|gokishazhakazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhakazmush毛|shazhakazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkmush毛|goshazhakaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhakazmush毛|gokishazhakazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhakazmuro|shazhakazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhakaznkmuro|goshazhakaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhakazmuro|gokishazhakazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
